description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a large grassy yard and a body of water at the rear. The house features a prominent gable roof in dark gray, with a covered front porch supported by columns and a set of steps leading up to the entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a deck or porch that overlooks the water, accessible by a set of stairs. The exterior walls are clad in a warm, wood-toned material, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on both the front and rear facades. The property includes a paved driveway leading to the front entrance, and the overall setting suggests a suburban or lakeside neighborhood. The structure appears solid and well-built, with architectural details typical of Craftsman or Ranch-style bungalows.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and rear deck overlooking water, set on a grassy lot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the proximity to the water at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the deck or porch facing the water, with stairs leading down to the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, window placement, and the relationship between the grassy yard and the water.
